# ito — Is this ok?

> Anonymous, non-judgmental space to think through hookups, consent, and confusing moments. No login, no history saved.

ito gives you an honest read on situations involving sex, dating, and consent. You write what's going on in your own words and get a thoughtful perspective back. Nothing is stored and nothing is tied to you.

## Pages

- [Home / Check-in](/check-in): The main intake — describe a situation and get a perspective.
- [About](/about): What ito is, why it exists, how privacy works, and FAQ.
- [Resources](/blog): Articles on hookups, consent, and how to think through what happened.
- [Privacy](/privacy): How (little) data is handled.
- [Release notes](/release-notes): Product changes over time.

## Optional

- [Embed prototype](/embed): Clickable demo of how ito can be embedded into messaging apps.
